ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES WITH CASE NO. 507391

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM VEDERMAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-507391 WITH CASE CGC-11-516181 - THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED. HOWEVER, THIS ORDER DOES NOT EXTEND THE TIME IN WHICH DISCOVERY OF ANY KIND MUST BE HAD ON THE COMPLAINT IN 11-507391 NOR DOES IT EFFECT THE RIGHT (OR NOT) TO A JURY TRIAL IN THAT CASE. THIS ORDER DOES NOT AFFECT THE TRIAL DATE IN ANY CASE, AND ACCORDINGLY IF A PARTY DESIRES TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL IN 11-507391, A SEPARATE APPLICATION TO THE DEPARTMENT OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE MUST BE MADE. ASSUMING A SINGLE TRIAL OF THE CONSOLIDATED CASES, THE TRIAL JUDGE WILL DETERMINE THE ORDER OF PROOF. LEAD CASE NUMBER IS 507391. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-507391 WITH CASE CGC-11-516181
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WILLIAM VEDERMAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-507391 WITH CASE CGC-11-516181 - The motion to consolidate is granted. However, this order does not extend the time in which discovery of any kind must be had on the complaint in 11-507391 nor does it effect the right (or not) to a jury trial in that case. This order does not affect the trial date in any case, and accordingly if a party desires to continue the trial in 11-507391, a separate application to the Department of the Presiding Judge must be made. Assuming a single trial of the consolidated cases, the trial judge will determine the order of proof. LEAD CASE NUMBER IS 507391. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
